items.title: Multiple Sclerosis and Outpatient Physician Care in the Last Years of Life: A Population-Based Study.
items.abstract: Patients with multiple sclerosis (MS) require increasing health care support, particularly in the last year of life. Despite the benefits of palliative care in addressing symptom burden and improving quality of life, its integration into MS care remains inconsistent. This study aimed to characterize health care utilization and palliative care access among people with MS in the last years of life and to identify key factors associated with hospital death and receipt of palliative care. A retrospective cohort study was conducted using linked health administrative databases in Ontario, Canada. The cohort consisted of all decedents aged 18 years or older who died in Ontario between April 2016 and March 2020, and we compared health care utilization in decedents with MS to the rest of the cohort. The identification of MS cases was based on a validated algorithm. Demographics, health care utilization, palliative care involvement, and medical interventions were analyzed. Predictors of palliative care receipt and hospital deaths were evaluated using multivariable logistic regression models. MS decedents (n = 1,975; mean age 68 years; 66.4% female) were younger and had fewer comorbidities than non-MS decedents (n = 500,904; mean age 77). High percentage of MS decedents had outpatient neurology visits in the last 5 years of life (49.4%) but a steep decline closer to death (2.7% in the last month). Palliative care use was similar (58.0% vs 56.9%) but occurred earlier in MS (61.9% vs 59.6% in the last 5 years). Multivariable regression showed that rural residence was associated with increased odds of hospital death (odds ratio [OR] 1.81, 95% CI 1.21-2.70) and lower odds of receiving palliative care (OR 0.74, 95% CI 0.55-0.99), while receiving palliative care within the last 5 years of life reduced the odds of hospital death (OR 0.47, 95% CI 0.37-0.60). Higher comorbidity and increased outpatient visits to urology were associated with a greater odd of receiving palliative care (OR 3.64, 95% CI 2.50-5.29 and OR 1.47, 95% CI 1.20-1.80). Although palliative care receipt was comparable between MS and non-MS decedents, rural disparities and high hospital deaths persist. Earlier palliative integration, particularly through neuropalliative care, could improve quality of life and reduce hospitalizations.
items.summary_ja: 本研究は、多発性硬化症（MS）患者の終末期における外来医療利用と緩和ケアの実態を明らかにすることを目的とした。カナダ・オンタリオ州の死亡者データベースを用いた後ろ向きコホート研究で、2016～2020年に死亡した18歳以上のMS患者（n=1,975）と非MS患者（n=500,904）を比較した。MS患者は非MS患者より若年で併存疾患が少なく、終末期5年間の神経科外来受診率は高かったが、死の直前1か月は急激に減少した。緩和ケアの利用率は両群でほぼ同等だったが、MS患者ではより早期に開始されていた。多変量解析では、農村部居住が病院死のリスク増加（OR 1.81）と緩和ケア受診率低下（OR 0.74）に関連し、緩和ケア受診は病院死リスクを低減（OR 0.47）した。併存疾患の多さや泌尿器科外来受診増加も緩和ケア受診と関連した。結論として、MS患者の緩和ケア受診率は非MS患者と同等だが、農村部の格差や高い病院死率が残存しており、神経緩和ケアを含む早期の緩和ケア統合が生活の質向上と入院減少に寄与すると示唆された。
items.summary_short_ja: 多発性硬化症（MS）患者は終末期に医療支援が増加するが、緩和ケアの導入は一貫していない。本研究はカナダ・オンタリオ州の死亡者データを用い、MS患者の終末期の外来受診や緩和ケア利用を分析。MS患者は非MS患者より若年で外来神経科受診が多いが死期が近づくと減少。緩和ケア利用率は同等だが、農村部では病院死が多く緩和ケア利用が少ない。早期の神経緩和ケア導入が生活の質向上と入院減少に有効と示唆された。

items.title: Clinical Reasoning: A Woman With Parkinson Disease, Dyskinesia, Rhabdomyolysis, Subcutaneous Emphysema, and Pneumomediastinum.
items.abstract: A 47-year-old woman with Parkinson disease (PD) complicated by severe motor fluctuations had been treated with deep brain stimulation (DBS) for 11 years and intestinal carbidopa/levodopa infusion for 5 years. Three months after her most recent clinic visit, at which both the DBS and infusion pump systems were confirmed to be functioning appropriately, she presented to the emergency department with abnormal movements. On examination, she had continuous, generalized, involuntary hyperkinetic movements with an erratic, dance-like quality, consistent with levodopa-associated dyskinesia. Evaluation revealed rhabdomyolysis, subcutaneous emphysema, and pneumomediastinum. She required admission to the intensive care unit for sedation and airway protection. After a key surgical intervention, she rapidly returned to her previous neurologic status and was discharged home. This case highlights the approach to acute dyskinesia and underscores the challenges of managing severe motor fluctuations in patients with PD.
items.summary_ja: 背景：パーキンソン病（PD）患者における重度の運動変動は治療が難しい。方法：47歳女性PD患者が11年間の脳深部刺激療法（DBS）と5年間の腸管カルビドパ・レボドパ持続注入療法を受けていた。最近の診察で両治療機器は正常作動が確認されたが、3か月後に異常運動を主訴に救急受診した。結果：全身に持続する不随意の過活動運動（レボドパ関連ジスキネジア）を認め、検査で横紋筋融解症、皮下気腫、縦隔気腫を発見。集中治療室で鎮静と気道管理が必要となり、重要な外科的介入後に神経症状は速やかに改善し退院した。結論：本症例は急性ジスキネジアへの対応と、PD患者の重度運動変動管理の難しさを示している。
items.summary_short_ja: パーキンソン病の47歳女性が、深部脳刺激療法と腸管カビドパ/レボドパ持続注入療法中に異常運動を呈し、レビドパ関連ジスキネジアと診断された。筋融解症、皮下気腫、縦隔気腫を合併し、集中治療室での鎮静と気道確保が必要となった。外科的処置後、神経症状は改善し退院した。本症例は急性ジスキネジアの対応と重度運動変動管理の難しさを示している。

items.title: Clinical Reasoning: A 28-Year-Old Man With Seizures and Thalamic Lesions.
items.abstract: This case involves a 28-year-old Black man who presented with new-onset seizures and bilateral medial temporal lobe hyperintensities on brain MRI, initially raising concern for viral encephalitis. CSF analysis revealed mild lymphocytic pleocytosis, but extensive infectious testing was negative. One year later, he developed acute right-sided weakness, and an MRI showed an enhancing FLAIR/T2 hyperintense mass-like lesion in the left thalamus. Stereotactic biopsy demonstrated reactive changes and Periodic acid-Schiff diastase (PASD)-positive macrophages, prompting consideration of atypical infectious or inflammatory etiologies. Despite empiric antibiotic treatment, his symptoms recurred 8 months later with new T2/FLAIR hyperintense lesions in the bilateral thalami and internal capsule, accompanied by mucocutaneous findings. He responded well to immunosuppressive therapy, with significant clinical and radiographic improvement. This case highlights the challenges of diagnosing relapsing neurologic syndromes with overlapping infectious, inflammatory, and neoplastic features and underscores the importance of integrating imaging, histopathology, and clinical evolution to reach a definitive diagnosis.
items.summary_ja: 背景：28歳の男性が新規発作と両側内側側頭葉のMRI高信号を呈し、ウイルス性脳炎が疑われた。方法：髄液検査で軽度のリンパ球増加が認められたが、感染症検査は陰性。1年後に右片麻痺が出現し、左視床に造影効果を伴うFLAIR/T2高信号の腫瘤様病変がMRIで確認された。定位生検では反応性変化とPASD陽性マクロファージが認められ、非典型的な感染性または炎症性疾患が考慮された。結果：抗菌薬治療後も8か月で症状再発し、両側視床と内包に新たな高信号病変と粘膜皮膚症状が出現。免疫抑制療法に良好に反応し、臨床・画像所見が著明に改善した。結論：感染性、炎症性、腫瘍性が重複する再発性神経症候群の診断は困難であり、画像、組織病理、臨床経過の統合的評価が確定診断に不可欠であることを示した。
items.summary_short_ja: 28歳の男性が新規発作と両側内側側頭葉のMRI異常で受診し、感染症は否定された。1年後に右片麻痺が出現し、左視床に病変が確認された。生検で反応性変化とPASD陽性マクロファージが認められ、非典型的な感染または炎症性疾患が疑われた。抗菌薬治療後も再発し、免疫抑制療法で改善。感染・炎症・腫瘍の鑑別が困難な症例で、画像・病理・臨床経過の統合が重要である。

items.title: Pearls & Oy-sters: Stroke Recurrence After PFO Closure Uncovers Cerebrotendinous Xanthomatosis.
items.abstract: Cerebrotendinous xanthomatosis (CTX) is a rare autosomal recessive metabolic disorder that can cause premature atherosclerosis and ischemic stroke in young adults. We report a 23-year-old man who had recurrent strokes even after patent foramen ovale (PFO) closure. Initial evaluation for his first cryptogenic stroke revealed a PFO with a high Risk of Paradoxical Embolism (RoPE) score, leading to closure. Three years later, he experienced a recurrent stroke with right M1 segment occlusion. High-resolution magnetic resonance vessel wall imaging demonstrated intracranial atherosclerotic plaque, prompting reconsideration of the etiology. Further history taking revealed chronic diarrhea since infancy and juvenile cataracts. Examination showed borderline intellectual functioning, bilateral ankle clonus, and Achilles tendon xanthomas. Brain MRI exhibited characteristic bilateral dentate nucleus hyperintensities. Genetic testing confirmed CYP27A1 pathogenic variants, consistent with a diagnosis of CTX. Through highlighting CTX underlying premature atherosclerosis and stroke in a young man, this case emphasizes the importance of rare metabolic disorders in stroke, even when a common cause such as PFO is identified. Early recognition enables targeted therapy and improves outcomes.
items.summary_ja: 背景：脳腱黄色腫症（CTX）は、若年成人に早期動脈硬化や虚血性脳卒中を引き起こすまれな常染色体劣性代謝疾患である。方法：23歳男性の症例を報告。初回の原因不明脳卒中で高リスクの卵円孔開存（PFO）が認められ閉鎖術を施行したが、3年後に再発し右M1閉塞を呈した。結果：高解像度MRI血管壁画像で頭蓋内動脈硬化性プラークを検出。詳細な病歴聴取で乳幼児期からの慢性下痢や若年性白内障が判明し、身体所見で知的境界域、両側アキレス腱黄色腫、両側足関節クローヌスを認めた。脳MRIでは両側歯状核の特徴的高信号を示し、遺伝子検査でCYP27A1変異が確認されCTXと診断された。結論：PFO閉鎖後の脳卒中再発例において、まれな代謝疾患であるCTXが早期動脈硬化と脳卒中の原因となっていることを示した。早期診断により適切な治療が可能となり、予後改善に寄与する。
items.summary_short_ja: 23歳男性が特発性脳梗塞で卵円孔開存（PFO）閉鎖後も再発。再発時の詳細検査で脳動脈硬化が判明し、幼少期からの慢性下痢や若年白内障、アキレス腱黄色腫などの症状と合わせて遺伝子検査を実施。CYP27A1遺伝子変異により脳腱黄色腫症（CTX）と診断された。本症は若年の早期動脈硬化・脳梗塞の原因となり、PFO以外の希少代謝疾患の鑑別が重要であることを示す。

items.title: Bridging the Gap: Baló Concentric Sclerosis-Like Leukoencephalopathy in Chronic Cocaine Use: A 1-Year Clinical and Imaging Follow-Up of 2 Cases.
items.abstract: Cocaine use is occasionally associated with development of acute leukoencephalopathy but only rarely do the magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) features resemble Baló concentric sclerosis, a demyelinating disorder traditionally considered within the multiple sclerosis spectrum. Here, we report 2 patients with history of cocaine use living in the same geographic area who were referred for acute multifocal leukoencephalopathy with a Baló-like pattern.Patient 1, a 31-year-old woman originally from the Philippines with chronic cocaine use history, presented with 1 week of rapidly worsening nonfluent aphasia, neglect, severe right hemiparesis, and numbness on the same side. Two months later, patient 2, a 25-year-old man originally from Morocco with chronic cocaine use history, presented with acute left leg weakness, confusion, and neglect. In both patients, brain MRI revealed multiple T2-hyperintense rounded lesions in the white matter, characterized by a concentric target-like appearance and gadolinium-enhanced incomplete ring pattern. In patient 1, a stereotactic biopsy confirmed a demyelinating inflammatory process with microcystic degeneration, increased cellularity, and macrophage/CD4+ lymphocyte infiltration. Both patients were treated with high-dose IV corticosteroid, resulting in significant clinical and radiologic improvement sustained at 1-year follow-up. Although corticosteroids yield promising outcomes, long-term prognosis hinges on sustained treatment adherence and abstinence from cocaine.The temporal and geographic proximity of these cases, occurring within 2 months in the same Italian province (covering an area of approximately 70 miles), raises the possibility of a shared toxic exposure which might explain the unique pathology and provide clues to the immune mechanisms that drive Baló-like demyelination.
items.summary_ja:
背景：コカイン使用は急性白質脳症を引き起こすことがあるが、MRIでBaló同心性硬化症様の特徴を示す例は稀である。Baló硬化症は多発性硬化症スペクトラムに含まれる脱髄疾患である。  
方法：同一地域に住む慢性コカイン使用歴のある2例を対象に、臨床経過とMRI所見を1年間追跡した。患者1は31歳女性で、非流暢性失語、無視、右片麻痺を呈し、患者2は25歳男性で左下肢の筋力低下と意識障害を呈した。MRIでは両者とも白質に同心円状のT2高信号病変とガドリニウム増強の不完全輪状パターンを認めた。患者1は立体的生検で脱髄性炎症と免疫細胞浸潤を確認した。  
結果：両患者は高用量静脈内ステロイド療法を受け、臨床的・画像的に著明な改善を示し、1年後も良好な経過を維持した。  
結論：コカイン関連のBaló様白質脳症はステロイド治療により改善が期待できるが、長期予後は治療継続とコカイン断絶に依存する。地理的・時間的近接性から共通の毒性曝露が示唆され、Baló様脱髄の免疫機序解明の手がかりとなる可能性がある。
items.summary_short_ja: 慢性コカイン使用者2名が、Baló型の同心円状脱髄を示す急性多巣性白質脳症を発症した。MRIでは特徴的な同心円状病変が認められ、1例は生検で脱髄性炎症が確認された。高用量ステロイド治療により1年後も臨床・画像所見が改善したが、長期予後は治療継続とコカイン断絶に依存する。地理的・時間的近接から共通の毒性曝露が示唆され、Baló様脱髄の免疫機序解明に寄与する可能性がある。

items.title: Sensitivity of Nerve and Skin Biopsy and Fat Aspirate for Amyloid in Symptomatic Hereditary ATTR Amyloidosis With Peripheral Neuropathy.
items.abstract: The aim of this study was to compare the sensitivity of nerve biopsy, fat aspirate, and skin biopsy in detecting amyloid in symptomatic hereditary transthyretin amyloidosis with peripheral neuropathy (ATTRv-PN). We identified patients with ATTRv-PN (2012-2023) seen at one of the Mayo Clinic 3 sites in Minnesota, Florida, and Arizona. Patients with symptomatic PN confirmed by a neurologist or EMG, who underwent an abdominal fat aspiration, skin biopsy, or nerve biopsy, were included. All patients had a pathogenic  Of the 195 patients with symptomatic ATTRv-PN seen, 111 were included. The median age was 64.2 years (interquartile range 56.9-70.1), and 74.8% were male. Fat aspirate was positive for amyloid in 50 of 103 patients (sensitivity 48.5%, 95% CI 0.39-0.59), skin biopsy in 17 of 32 (sensitivity 53.1%, 95% CI 0.35-0.71), and nerve biopsy in 20 of 21 (sensitivity 95%, 95% CI 0.76-1.0). Skin biopsy yielded a higher sensitivity (60% vs 24%;  Nerve biopsies are more sensitive than fat aspirate or skin biopsy for tissue diagnosis in this retrospective cohort of patients with symptomatic ATTRv-PN. Skin biopsy was slightly more sensitive than fat aspirate. This study provides Class IV evidence that a nerve biopsy, fat aspirate, and skin biopsy can accurately diagnose hereditary transthyretin amyloidosis in patients presenting with polyneuropathy. Nerve biopsies are more accurate than fat aspirates or skin biopsies in identifying patients with hereditary transthyretin amyloidosis.
items.summary_ja:
背景：遺伝性トランスサイレチンアミロイドーシス（ATTRv）による末梢神経障害患者におけるアミロイド検出のため、神経生検、皮膚生検、脂肪吸引の感度を比較する必要があった。  
方法：2012年から2023年にかけて、メイヨークリニックの3拠点で診察された症候性ATTRv末梢神経障害患者111名（中央値年齢64.2歳、男性74.8%）を対象に、神経生検、皮膚生検、腹部脂肪吸引でのアミロイド検出感度を後ろ向きに評価した。  
結果：脂肪吸引の感度は48.5%（103例中50例）、皮膚生検は53.1%（32例中17例）、神経生検は95%（21例中20例）であった。皮膚生検は脂肪吸引よりやや高感度であったが、神経生検が最も高感度であった。  
結論：症候性ATTRv末梢神経障害患者の組織診断において、神経生検は脂肪吸引や皮膚生検よりも高い感度を示し、より正確な診断法であることが示された。皮膚生検は脂肪吸引よりも若干優れているが、神経生検が最も推奨される。
items.summary_short_ja: 本研究は、末梢神経障害を伴う遺伝性トランスサイレチンアミロイドーシス（ATTRv-PN）患者におけるアミロイド検出感度を、神経生検、皮膚生検、脂肪吸引で比較した。111例中、神経生検の感度は95%と最も高く、皮膚生検は53.1%、脂肪吸引は48.5%であった。神経生検が診断に最も有効であり、皮膚生検は脂肪吸引よりやや感度が高いことが示された。

items.title: Acute Kidney Injury and Risk of Adverse Neurocognitive Outcomes: A Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis.
items.abstract: Chronic kidney disease is a recognized risk factor for adverse neurocognitive outcomes, but the effect of acute kidney injury (AKI) on brain health remains less well defined. We conducted a systematic review and meta-analysis to evaluate associations between AKI and subsequent risk of stroke, delirium, and dementia. Eligible studies were identified by searching Ovid MEDLINE and Embase from inception (Ovid: January 1946; Embase: January 1970) until April 2025. Studies were included if they reported quantitative estimates with measures of precision for the association between AKI and delirium, stroke, or dementia in adult populations. Two reviewers independently screened and extracted data, and study quality was assessed using standardized criteria. Study characteristics, participant demographics, and adjusted effect estimates (hazard ratios [HRs] or odds ratios [ORs]) with 95% CIs were extracted. Pooled HRs and ORs with 95% CIs were calculated using random-effects models. Heterogeneity was evaluated with the χ We identified 49 studies comprising 11,253,825 participants with 1,279,145 events. Individuals with AKI were at increased risk of stroke (pooled adjusted HR 1.35, 95% CI 1.20-1.52), delirium (pooled adjusted OR 1.76; 1.42-2.17), and dementia (pooled adjusted HR 1.64, 1.41-1.89). A gradient of risk across increasing AKI stages was demonstrated for stroke (stage 1: HR 1.11; 1.00-1.23; combined stages 2 and 3: HR 1.57; 1.35-1.81). AKI was also associated with higher in-hospital and 90-day mortality poststroke (pooled HR 2.13, 1.56-2.90, and 4.81, 2.55-9.08, respectively) and with 90-day disability (pooled adjusted OR 1.47, 1.22-1.76). Associations between AKI and all outcomes were directionally consistent across sensitivity analyses and pooled propensity score-matched studies. In this systematic review and meta-analysis, AKI was consistently associated with increased short-term and long-term neurocognitive risk, including stroke, delirium, and dementia. These findings suggest that AKI may identify individuals vulnerable to both acute and chronic brain injury. Further studies are needed to clarify mechanisms linking AKI to brain injury and to identify strategies to mitigate neurocognitive risk in this high-risk population.
items.summary_ja:
背景：慢性腎臓病は神経認知機能障害のリスク因子として知られているが、急性腎障害（AKI）が脳の健康に与える影響は明確でない。  
方法：Ovid MEDLINEおよびEmbaseを用いて1946年から2025年4月までの文献を検索し、成人におけるAKIと脳卒中、せん妄、認知症の関連を定量的に評価した49件の研究（計1,125万3,825人、127万9,145イベント）を対象にシステマティックレビューとメタ解析を実施。ハザード比（HR）やオッズ比（OR）を用いてランダム効果モデルで統合解析を行った。  
結果：AKI患者は脳卒中（HR 1.35）、せん妄（OR 1.76）、認知症（HR 1.64）のリスクが有意に増加。AKIの重症度が上がるほど脳卒中リスクも増加（ステージ1：HR 1.11、ステージ2・3：HR 1.57）。さらに、AKIは脳卒中後の入院中および90日死亡率上昇（HR 2.13、4.81）や90日後の障害リスク増加（OR 1.47）とも関連。感度分析でも結果は一貫。  
結論：AKIは短期・長期にわたり神経認知機能障害のリスク増加と関連し、急性および慢性の脳障害に対する脆弱性を示唆する。今後、AKIと脳障害の関連機序解明とリスク軽減策の検討が必要である。
items.summary_short_ja: 急性腎障害（AKI）は脳卒中、せん妄、認知症のリスク増加と関連し、AKIの重症度が高いほどリスクも上昇することが、11万人超のデータを基にした49件の研究のメタ解析で示された。さらに、AKI患者は脳卒中後の死亡率や障害リスクも高く、AKIが急性および慢性の脳障害の脆弱性指標となる可能性が示唆された。今後、AKIと脳障害の関連機序解明と予防策の検討が必要である。

items.title: The Prevalence and Incidence of Cluster Headache: A Norwegian Population-Based Time-Trend Study.
items.abstract: Data on time trends in cluster headache epidemiology are sparse. The aim of this study was to report trends in prevalence and incidence of cluster headache in Norway over a 14-year period. We conducted a registry-based study using linked data from the Norwegian Registry for Primary Health Care, the Norwegian Control and Payment of Health Reimbursements Database, the Norwegian Patient Registry, the Norwegian Prescribed Drug Registry, and Statistics Norway from 2009 to 2022. Data included diagnostic codes, prescriptions, and education. Adults (age ≥18 years) were included. Cluster headache prevalence was defined as ≥2 contacts (clinical consults or prescriptions) for cluster headache in a 365-day period. Age-standardized trends in prevalence and incidence by sex and year, and interactions between education and year, were analyzed with negative binomial regression. We estimated prevalence rate ratio (PRR) and incidence rate ratio per calendar year with 95% CIs. The number of patients with cluster headache increased from 1,029 in 2009 (median age 44 years; 39.7% women) to 1,833 patients in 2022 (median age 47 years; 50.1% women). The annual age-standardized prevalence rate increased from 27.0 to 42.5 per 100,000 in the same period. Women had a 3-fold higher annual increase of 6% (PRR 1.06, 95% CI 1.05-1.07) compared with 2% (PRR 1.02, 95% CI 1.02-1.03) in men. The prevalence rate was higher in women than in men by 2022 (43.4 vs 41.7 per 100,000). The annual prevalence of chronic cluster headache and refractory chronic cluster headache varied between 6%-7% and 1%-2% of all cluster headache cases, respectively. The annual age-standardized incidence rate of cluster headache increased in women, from 10.1 to 14.6 per 100,000 from 2012 to 2022 and decreased in men, from 13.5 to 11.0 per 100,000. Incidence and prevalence rates were higher among individuals with lower education. Prevalence increased over 14 years, possibly reflecting improved diagnostic practices and awareness. These findings challenge previous reports of cluster headache predominantly affecting men, illustrating distinct shifts and trends in disease epidemiology. A limitation was the lack of clinical validation of cluster headache diagnostic codes in primary health care.
items.summary_ja:
背景：群発頭痛の疫学における時間的変化に関するデータは限られている。本研究は、ノルウェーにおける14年間の群発頭痛の有病率および発症率の動向を明らかにすることを目的とした。  
方法：2009年から2022年までのノルウェーの複数の医療・統計データベースを連結し、18歳以上の成人を対象に群発頭痛の診断コードや処方情報を用いて解析を行った。有病率は1年間に2回以上の診療または処方を基準とし、年齢標準化した性別・年別の傾向を負の二項回帰で評価した。  
結果：患者数は2009年の1,029人から2022年の1,833人に増加し、有病率は27.0から42.5/10万人に上昇した。女性の増加率は男性の3倍で、2022年には女性の有病率が男性を上回った。慢性群発頭痛は全体の6～7%、難治性は1～2%を占めた。発症率は女性で増加（10.1→14.6/10万人）、男性で減少（13.5→11.0/10万人）し、教育水準が低いほど高かった。  
結論：群発頭痛の有病率は14年間で増加し、診断精度や認知度の向上が影響している可能性がある。従来の「男性に多い」という認識に対し、女性の割合増加など疫学的変化を示した。ただし、診断コードの臨床的検証が不足している点は限界である。
items.summary_short_ja: ノルウェーにおける2009年から2022年の14年間で、群発頭痛の有病率は年齢調整後で27.0から42.5/10万人に増加し、特に女性で増加率が男性の3倍に達した。発症率は女性で増加（10.1→14.6/10万人）、男性で減少（13.5→11.0/10万人）した。教育水準が低いほど発症率・有病率が高く、診断の向上や認知度の変化が背景と考えられる。従来の男性優位説に異議を唱える結果である。

items.title: Antiseizure Medication Polytherapies During Pregnancy and the Risk of Congenital Malformations.
items.abstract: The use of antiseizure medication (ASM) polytherapy has become increasingly common. However, it is known that there is an elevated risk of major congenital malformations (MCMs) in newborns after maternal use of select ASMs. This study characterizes the risk of MCMs in infants born to women using common ASM polytherapies during the first trimester. The study population was pregnant women enrolled in the North American AED Pregnancy Registry between 1997 and 2024. Phone interviews at enrollment, 7 months' gestation, and postpartum collected data on ASM use and maternal characteristics. ASM monotherapy or polytherapy exposure is defined by ASM or ASM combination use during the first 12 weeks of pregnancy. MCMs were confirmed by medical records and adjudicated by a blinded teratologist. The risk of MCMs was calculated among infants exposed to a specific ASM polytherapy during the first trimester of pregnancy and those exposed to lamotrigine (LTG) monotherapy. RRs and 95% CIs were estimated using logistic regression. In a population of 15,318 pregnant women taking ASM at conception, 2,348 (15.3%) used 2 or more ASMs during the first trimester, with 796 polytherapy-exposed pregnancies eligible for analysis (mean age 30 years). The most common monotherapy was lamotrigine (LTG) (n = 2,582, mean age 31 years). The most common polytherapy combination was levetiracetam-lamotrigine (LEV-LTG) (38.4%). Indication of analyzed ASM polytherapy use was largely epilepsy (98.5%). The prevalence of MCMs was 2.0% for the reference LTG monotherapy group. Compared with LTG monotherapy, the adjusted RR of MCM was 1.63 (95% CI 0.69-3.40) for levetiracetam-LTG, 0.78 (0.04-3.78) for levetiracetam-carbamazepine, 0.99 (0.05-5.29) for levetiracetam-lacosamide, 1.40 (0.22-4.97) for levetiracetam-topiramate, 1.21 (0.07-6.22) for levetiracetam-zonisamide, 3.25 (0.74-9.98) for LTG-carbamazepine, 4.54 (1.61-11.07) for LTG-topiramate, and 3.22 (0.74-9.79) for LTG-zonisamide. Among infants exposed to any ASM polytherapy, the most common MCMs were hypospadias (5 cases), ventricular septal defect (5 cases), and cleft lip/palate (4 cases). All cleft lip/palate cases occurred in combinations with either topiramate or zonisamide. Our findings suggest an increased risk of MCM associated with LTG-topiramate duotherapy compared with LTG monotherapy. Relative risk estimates were too imprecise for us to conclude on the teratogenicity of other analyzed polytherapy combinations.
items.summary_ja:
背景：抗てんかん薬（ASM）の多剤併用療法は増加しているが、特定のASM使用時に新生児の主要先天異常（MCM）リスクが高まることが知られている。本研究は、妊娠初期に一般的なASM多剤併用療法を使用した女性の新生児におけるMCMリスクを評価した。

方法：1997～2024年に北米AED妊娠登録に登録された妊婦15,318名を対象に、妊娠初期12週までのASM単剤または多剤使用状況を電話調査で収集。MCMは医療記録で確認し、盲検の奇形専門医が評価。リスク比（RR）と95％信頼区間（CI）をロジスティック回帰で算出し、ラモトリギン（LTG）単剤群と比較した。

結果：多剤併用群は2,348名（15.3％）、分析対象は796妊娠例。最も多い単剤はLTG（2,582例）、多剤併用はレベチラセタム（LEV）-LTG（38.4％）が最多。MCM発生率はLTG単剤群で2.0％。LTG-トピラマート併用群はRR 4.54（95％CI 1.61-11.07）で有意にリスク増加。その他の併用療法はRRの不確実性が大きく結論困難。主なMCMは尿道下裂、心室中隔欠損、口唇口蓋裂で、口唇口蓋裂はトピラマートまたはゾニサミド併用例に集中。

結論：LTG-トピラマート併用はLTG単剤に比べてMCMリスクが増加する可能性が示唆されたが、他の多剤併用療法の催奇形性についてはさらなる検証が必要である。
items.summary_short_ja: 本研究は、妊娠初期に抗てんかん薬（ASM）ポリセラピーを使用した妊婦と新生児の主要先天異常（MCM）リスクを検討した。北米AED妊娠登録の15,318例中、15.3%がポリセラピーを使用。最も多い組み合わせはレベチラセタム-ラモトリギン（LEV-LTG）で、MCM発生率はLTG単剤群の2.0%と比較し、LTG-トピラマート併用群で有意にリスク増加（RR 4.54）が示された。他の組み合わせのリスクは不明瞭であった。

items.title: Late-Onset Seizures: Etiology and Demographics in US Tertiary Care Epilepsy Centers.
items.abstract: Adults older than age 55 years have the highest incidence rate and are the fastest-growing population among people with epilepsy. The aim of this study was to characterize the etiologies of new-onset seizures in older adults and to examine how seizure etiology varies across demographic groups. We used data from 7 US epilepsy centers from 2021 to 2025 and compared findings with those of previous population-based studies, providing an updated view and highlighting opportunities for prevention and improved risk stratification. We retrospectively reviewed medical charts of 2,052 patients aged ≥55 years at the time of a first seizure, who were evaluated at 7 epilepsy centers between 2021 and 2025. We categorized seizures by etiology as follows: ischemic stroke, hemorrhagic stroke, tumor, neurodegeneration, provoked seizures, traumatic brain injury, and unknown. We examined differences in etiology by demographic strata (age, sex, race, and primary language) using chi-square tests, Kruskal-Wallis tests, analysis of variance, and Cuzick tests. The most frequent seizure etiologies among older adults were unknown (29.9%), ischemic stroke (15.4%), and provoked seizures (14.9%). Neurodegenerative disease was the etiology for 5.3% of cases overall but increased in prevalence with age, accounting for 18.5% among patients aged 85-89 years. Seizure etiologies also differed by sex and race. Men more commonly had seizures caused by cerebrovascular disease and traumatic brain injury, while women more commonly had seizures due to neurodegenerative disease. Black patients had higher proportions of ischemic stroke and neurodegenerative disease, while unexplained epilepsy was more common among White patients. The causes of late-onset seizures vary based on age, sex, and race. Nearly one-third of cases of epilepsy in older adults remain unexplained despite advances in imaging techniques, underscoring the need for further research on the mechanisms and health implications of late-onset unexplained epilepsy. Improved prevention of cerebrovascular disease and optimized management of provoked seizures may reduce the growing burden of epilepsy in older adults.
items.summary_ja:
背景：55歳以上の成人はてんかん発症率が最も高く、増加傾向にある。本研究は高齢者の新規発作の原因を明らかにし、人口統計学的要因による違いを検討することを目的とした。  
方法：2021～2025年に米国の7つのてんかん専門医療機関で初発発作を経験した2052人（55歳以上）の診療記録を後ろ向きに解析し、発作原因を虚血性脳卒中、出血性脳卒中、腫瘍、神経変性、誘発発作、外傷性脳損傷、不明に分類。年齢、性別、人種、言語別に原因の違いを統計的に検討した。  
結果：原因不明が29.9%で最多、次いで虚血性脳卒中（15.4%）、誘発発作（14.9%）であった。神経変性は全体の5.3%だが85～89歳では18.5%に増加。男性は脳血管疾患や外傷性脳損傷、女性は神経変性が多く、黒人は虚血性脳卒中や神経変性が多い一方、白人は原因不明が多かった。  
結論：高齢者の遅発性発作の原因は年齢、性別、人種で異なり、約3割は原因不明のままである。脳血管疾患の予防や誘発発作の管理強化が高齢者てんかんの負担軽減に寄与すると考えられる。
items.summary_short_ja: 55歳以上の初発てんかん患者2,052名を対象に、米国7施設で2021～2025年に後天性てんかんの原因を調査した。原因は不明（29.9%）、虚血性脳卒中（15.4%）、誘発性発作（14.9%）が多く、神経変性疾患は高齢ほど増加し85～89歳で18.5%を占めた。性別や人種でも原因に差があり、脳血管疾患や外傷は男性、神経変性は女性、黒人は脳卒中・神経変性が多い傾向。原因不明例が多く、さらなる研究と脳血管疾患予防が重要とされた。
